Implemented source.References: scans all text files in a Skill folder for /<name> tokens and ../<name>/ crossing paths, matched against known catalog names, with URL/word-boundary/binary guards. Unit-tested.
Added [[suggestion]] list to Config (from/to pairs + bulk 'from' for router skills), with IsSuggestion/AddSuggestion/RemoveSuggestion/HasBulkSuggestion and validation. Round-trip tested.

Added engine DepGraph: classifies refs into Dependency/Suggestion against Config, transitive Closure with cycle guard, per-Target Breakages (by name, installed-or-desired, cross-Source flag), ClosureCells for d/f keys. Refresh now resolves AvailableSkill.Refs. Tested.
Implemented amber unsatisfied cells and needs/suggests cursor detail line in the matrix
'd' key marks skill + transitive closure in the cursor's Target, conflict-free
Plan shows non-blocking broken section; f adds resolvable missing closure and recomputes
v view shows Dependencies section; 't' toggles edge Dependency<->Suggestion, persisting to config

Delivered in merged commit 06f48e0 (PR #1): token chain GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN/gh, Bearer over api.github.com tarball, 404/401/403 mapping, token-leak test, ADR 0004. Stale in_progress state cleaned up.

Implemented git-clone fetch: shallow --depth 1 --single-branch clone, update via fetch+reset --hard FETCH_HEAD+clean. git is a hard requirement (LookPath check, fail-fast error); GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 avoids TUI hangs on auth prompts; auth deferred to git (no token code). Deleted tarball/codeload/API/token machinery. README + fetch.go doc updated to ADR 0006. All tests pass; hermetic tests use local git repos as clone sources.

File view now reads+renders off the Update loop: openFile returns a tea.Cmd (renderFileCmd) that runs classifyFile + glamour render in a goroutine and posts fileRenderedMsg; the view shows 'loading…' until it lands. Added fileLoading state; stale renders (user navigated away / msg.path != openPath) are discarded. Split fileBody→pure renderBody, removed newFileViewport. Tests cover the async open, rendered view, and stale-render-ignored. UI stays responsive (esc/scroll) during render.

Added domain.Revision{Ref,ShortSHA,FetchedAt} with Label() => 'ref @ shortSHA'. Fetcher.Revision(src) reads git rev-parse --short HEAD (+abbrev-ref fallback when Branch unpinned); ok=false for local/unfetched. engine.Refresh captures per-Source revisions (FetchedAt=now) into Catalog.Revisions; persisted in catalog.json so a cached startup shows them. Displayed in skill-view metadata block and the config Sources list (with 'fetched Xago' via humanizeSince). Tests cover fetch.Revision, cache round-trip, and both display sites. README updated.

Background Refresh now defers the working-tree checkout for a Source whose skill view is open. fetch: split update into fetch-objects vs fetch+reset (FetchObjectsOnly skips reset/clean). engine: mutex-guarded viewedSource/deferred with BeginView/EndView/ViewedSource; Refresh fetch-only's the viewed Source and records the deferral. tui: enterSkillView calls BeginView; leaving the tree (esc→matrix) calls EndView and, if a checkout was deferred, kicks a catch-up Refresh serialised behind any in-flight one (pendingRefresh). Tests at all 3 layers + -race clean.

freshClone now handles a commit-SHA Branch: git init + remote add + shallow fetch of the exact SHA + reset (GitHub serves a reachable SHA). updateClone already fetches the ref so the update path works as-is. looksLikeCommitSHA(7-40 lowercase hex) gates it. Revision shows just the short SHA for a pin (empty ref label). Tests: pinned-commit clone yields the pinned content + correct revision, looksLikeCommitSHA unit table. README notes branch accepts a commit SHA.

Deepened dependency-breakage logic into one SkillGraph value (Edges/BrokenCells/ClosureCells). Deleted DepGraph/DependencyGraph/Breakages and TUI duplicates resolveOffer/sourceOffers/cellPresent. Graph built once per Catalog. All tests + race pass.

Introduced engine.Preview{Plan,Collisions,+pinned inputs} + engine.Apply(pre,opts) verbatim execution. Plan computed once (Reconcile only in Preview). Invariant unified in apply.collides used by Collisions + install; engine.Collision/Collisions/Plan deleted. Collisions surfaced in plan preview. All tests + race pass.
Full repository review completed; confirmed defects filed as individual bug issues with acceptance criteria.

Skill names validated as canonical single path components in source.parseFrontmatter (rejects separators, dot components, absolute/volume paths, control chars, surrounding whitespace); apply.install/uninstall enforce a destWithin containment backstop before any RemoveAll/copy. Tests cover ../victim, backslash, and platform escape forms in both packages.

Added sanitize/sanitizeMultiline in internal/tui and applied at all render-layer boundaries (skill names/descriptions/groups, file names, raw file bodies, git revision labels, source/apply errors). Strips ESC, C0 (incl CR), DEL, C1, invalid UTF-8, bidi overrides, and the zero-width divider sentinel. Tests cover ESC, OSC 52, CR, C1, bidi, filenames, descriptions, raw text, and read/git errors.
Scan now rejects duplicate Skill names within a Source with a stable per-Source error naming both relpaths; unit tests cover sibling-group duplicates and stable ordering. Commit 0cf140c.

Recorded install Path on Installation; Status and Reconcile now detect a Target path edit (same name) and emit a target-moved reinstall; Apply migrates to the new path and clears the old one. Legacy installs (empty Path) grandfathered. Fixed on branch bugfixes-july-14, commit 4976edc.

Fixed in 816c7b8: install/reinstall now stage the copy in a sibling temp folder and atomically swap into place; read/copy failures leave the live destination untouched and swap failures roll back the prior installation. Added copyTree/renamePath seams and fault-injection tests for read and rename failures.
